charter.name: legend-team
charter.purpose: Memory-first, topic-based strategy system. Master receives structured analysis from role-separated agents on any strategic topic, with all outputs preserved in inspectable, revisionable files.
principles: Memory first: all agent outputs, decisions, and session state are written to files immediately. No analysis lives only in conversation context.
Role separation: each agent (ace, arki, fin, riki, editor, nova) owns a distinct domain. Agents must not exceed their domain without escalating.
2-plane contract: local file-based write channel (Claude Code) and Cloudflare Pages read channel are kept strictly separate. No write operations through the viewer.
Master authority: all master feedback overrides agent outputs. No agent may ignore or paper over master direction.
No silent overwrite: every revision creates a new file. Prior versions are preserved.
Inspectability: every decision, every assumption, every contradiction must be traceable to a file.
No UI first: structural and strategic analysis precedes any interface or visualization work.
inScope: Multi-role structured debate (ace → arki → fin → riki → ace review → editor)
File-based memory: decisions, evidence, glossary, session state
Revision history for all agent outputs
Read-only static viewer via Cloudflare Pages (D-006)
outOfScope: External API integrations (unless explicitly approved by Master)
Frontend UI frameworks: JSX, React, or component-based UI
Write interactions in the viewer (forms, state-changing buttons)
Autonomous agent action without Master approval

roles.ace: Lead strategist and final arbiter. Opens topics, defines decision axes, sets scope, sequences the agenda. Performs comprehensive cross-review of all role outputs and delivers the final recommendation to Master.
roles.arki: Systems architect. Maps structure, dependencies, and design constraints.
roles.fin: Financial analyst. Evaluates cost, return, and resource viability.
roles.riki: Adversarial analyst. Exposes failure modes, weak assumptions, and contradictions.
roles.editor: Artifact compiler and output packager. Formats, organizes, and outputs final documents based on Ace's comprehensive review. Does not perform independent synthesis or judgment.
roles.nova: Speculative thinker. Advisory only. Invoked by Master request only. Never authoritative unless explicitly promoted.

topicContract.controlPath: topics/{topicId} — write-channel workspace (agenda, debate_log, decisions, issues, feedback)
topicContract.reportPath: reports/{YYYY-MM-DD}_{topic-slug} — artifact plane (role reports, publish metadata)

charter.masterAuthority: Master feedback is the highest authority in the system. Any agent output, decision, or plan can be overridden by Master at any point. Master decisions are recorded in memory/master/master_feedback_log.json and memory/shared/decision_ledger.json.
charter.sessionProtocol: See CLAUDE.md § Session Protocol for start/end checklist.

history.summary: Initial structure: agents, config, memory schema files created.
Memory initialized, reports/ structure created, session protocol adopted, project_charter written, TS scripts implemented.

Contract alignment: 2-plane read/write separation formalized. Ace/Editor authority boundary clarified. Workflow phases 1-6 canonical. topic_index schema upgraded to controlPath/reportPath. frontmatter schema canonicalized (role, report_status, session_status). Published manifest introduced.
